# Current Bahamas — Compliance Checklist: Nonprofits & NGOs
# Version 1.0 | April 2026
# For: Foundations, charities, social enterprises, NGOs, industry associations
# Derived from master checklist — nonprofit-specific items added

---

## Client: ___________________________  Code: ________
## Organisation type: _____________  Staff: ____  Island: ________________
## Checklist prepared: _______________  By: ___________

---

## SECTION 1: BUSINESS LICENCE

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Business licence current — correct category for nonprofit/foundation | [ ] | Confirm with IRD the correct category |
| Organisational structure confirmed (registered foundation, company, association) | [ ] | |
| Annual renewal due date in Airtable | [ ] | |
| Financial statements prepared if required | [ ] | |

**Nonprofit note:** The business licence category and requirements for foundations and NGOs can differ from commercial entities. Confirm with IRD or the client's accountant.

---

## SECTION 2: VAT

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| VAT registered? | [ ] Yes [ ] No | Many nonprofits are not VAT registered — confirm |
| Any trading activities that may trigger VAT registration | [ ] | e.g. merchandise sales, event ticket sales, services |
| Last VAT return current (if registered) | [ ] | Period: ________ Filed: ________ |

---

## SECTION 3: NIB

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| NIB employer number confirmed | [ ] | |
| Current employee count confirmed | [ ] | Count: ________ (paid staff, not volunteers) |
| Volunteers vs employees — NIB treatment confirmed | [ ] | Volunteers generally not subject to NIB; paid staff are |
| Last NIB payment current | [ ] | Period: ________ Paid: ________ |
| Any arrears outstanding | [ ] | |

---

## SECTION 4: TAX CLEARANCE CERTIFICATE (TCC) — CRITICAL FOR GRANT ACCESS

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Current TCC on file | [ ] | |
| **TCC required for: government grants, collecting payment from government or public bodies** | [ ] | Most nonprofit government funding requires TCC |
| Upcoming government grants or funding applications | [ ] | List: |
| Ministry applications pending | [ ] | Detail: |
| TCC expiry in Airtable — 30-day reminder active | [ ] | |
| TCC readiness: all filings current | [ ] Ready [ ] Gap-fill needed [ ] Blocker | |

**Nonprofit alert:** A missing or expired TCC can delay or block a government grant disbursement entirely. Maintain year-round — build TCC renewal into the grant calendar.

---

## SECTION 5: GOVERNMENT AND DONOR REPORTING

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Grant reporting obligations documented for each active grant | [ ] | |
| Reporting deadlines in Airtable (linked to compliance items) | [ ] | |
| Audited financials required for any active grant | [ ] | Note: CB coordinates; actual audit is accountant's scope |
| Annual returns / filings required by registering authority | [ ] | |

**Note:** Current Bahamas coordinates compliance documentation. Grant reporting narrative and audited accounts are the client's accountant's responsibility.

---

## SECTION 6: DONATIONS AND FUND RECEIPT

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Receipt documentation system for donations | [ ] | |
| Any government or foundation grants with compliance conditions | [ ] | List conditions: |
| International fund transfers — any regulatory reporting required | [ ] | |

---

## SECTION 7: AGRICULTURE / IMPORT PERMITS

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| Does the organisation import goods (equipment, supplies, food for programs) | [ ] Yes [ ] No | If No, skip |
| Permit categories required | [ ] | |
| Pre-purchase permit process confirmed | [ ] | |

| Item | Status | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|
| FIDEA eligibility (Family Island programmes) | [ ] | |
| Duty concessions on programme equipment, vehicles, computers | [ ] | |
| Any planned capital purchases >$5K in next 12 months | [ ] | Trigger for exemption packaging |
| Existing concessions documented and expiry tracked | [ ] | |
